name: @damatjs/damat-cli
description: Damat CLI - Development and build tool for Damat.js
author: Abel Lamesgen

scripts.build: rm -rf tsconfig.tsbuildinfo dist && bun scripts/embedAgents.ts && bun scripts/embedVersion.ts && tsc && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: test -f dist/cli.js && test -f dist/command/module/scaffold/agents.generated.js || (echo 'Error: build artifacts missing (dist/cli.js or embedded AGENTS guide). Run bun run build first.' && exit 1)
